query:
-- Criar tabela properties (imóveis)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS properties (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  propertyReference VARCHAR(64),
  isFromBaggio BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  address TEXT NOT NULL,
  zipCode VARCHAR(10),
  neighborhood VARCHAR(255),
  city VARCHAR(255),
  state VARCHAR(2),
  number VARCHAR(20),
  complement TEXT,
  advertisementValue DECIMAL(15, 2),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (companyId) REFERENCES companies(id),
  INDEX idx_companyId (companyId)
);

-- Criar tabela sales (vendas)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sales (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  propertyId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  buyerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  buyerCpfCnpj VARCHAR(20),
  saleDate TIMESTAMP,
  angariationDate TIMESTAMP,
  saleValue DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  clientOrigin VARCHAR(255),
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(255),
  brokerAngariador VARCHAR(64),
  brokerAngariadorType ENUM('internal', 'external') DEFAULT 'internal',
  brokerAngariadorName VARCHAR(255),
  brokerAngariadorCreci VARCHAR(50),
  brokerAngariadorEmail VARCHAR(320),
  brokerVendedor VARCHAR(64),
  brokerVendedorType ENUM('internal', 'external') DEFAULT 'internal',
  brokerVendedorName VARCHAR(255),
  brokerVendedorCreci VARCHAR(50),
  brokerVendedorEmail VARCHAR(320),
  businessType VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending', 'sale', 'manager_review', 'finance_review', 'commission_paid', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  registeredBy VARCHAR(64),
  registeredByName VARCHAR(255),
  registeredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  realEstateCommission DECIMAL(15, 2),
  observation TEXT,
  proposalDocumentUrl TEXT,
  propertyType VARCHAR(255),
  bedrooms INT,
  costPerM2 DECIMAL(15, 2),
  privateArea DECIMAL(10, 2),
  totalArea DECIMAL(10, 2),
  propertyAge INT,
  investmentType VARCHAR(255),
  financedValue DECIMAL(15, 2),
  cartoryBank VARCHAR(255),
  despachante VARCHAR(255),
  sellerName VARCHAR(255),
  sellerCpfCnpj VARCHAR(20),
  sellerPhone VARCHAR(20),
  buyerPhone VARCHAR(20),
  condominiumName VARCHAR(255),
  totalCommission DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalCommissionPercent DECIMAL(5, 2),
  angariadorCommission DECIMAL(15, 2),
  vendedorCommission DECIMAL(15, 2),
  baggioCommission DECIMAL(15, 2),
  expectedPaymentDate TIMESTAMP,
  saleType ENUM('lancamento', 'pronto'),
  responsible VARCHAR(255),
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  listingDate TIMESTAMP,
  listingStore VARCHAR(100),
  sellingStore VARCHAR(100),
  team VARCHAR(100),
  region VARCHAR(100),
  managementResponsible VARCHAR(100),
  deedStatus VARCHAR(50),
  bankName VARCHAR(255),
  financedAmount DECIMAL(15, 2),
  bankReturnPercentage DECIMAL(5, 2),
  bankReturnAmount DECIMAL(15, 2),
  observations TEXT,
  wasRemoved BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  downPaymentPercentage DECIMAL(5, 2),
  contractNumber VARCHAR(100),
  contractSignatureDate TIMESTAMP,
  portfolioStatus VARCHAR(100),
  priceDiscount DECIMAL(15, 2),
  listingToSaleDays INT,
  commissionPaymentDate TIMESTAMP,
  commissionAmountReceived DECIMAL(15, 2),
  commissionPaymentBank VARCHAR(255),
  commissionPaymentMethod VARCHAR(100),
  commissionPaymentObservations TEXT,
  tipoComissao VARCHAR(100),
  sinalNegocio VARCHAR(100),
  sinalNegocioEmpresa VARCHAR(255),
  sinalNegocioValor DECIMAL(15, 2),
  sinalNegocioDataPagamento TIMESTAMP,
  sinalNegocioComprovanteUrl TEXT,
  descricaoBonificacao TEXT,
  comissaoBonificacaoCorretor DECIMAL(15, 2),
  comissaoBonificacaoImobiliaria DECIMAL(15, 2),
  documents TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (companyId) REFERENCES companies(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id),
  INDEX idx_companyId (companyId),
  INDEX idx_propertyId (propertyId)
);

-- Criar tabela commissions (comissões)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commissions (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  saleId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  companyId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  brokerId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  commissionValue DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  commissionPercentage DECIMAL(5, 2) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('angariacao', 'venda', 'parceria') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'received', 'paid', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  paymentDate TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (saleId) REFERENCES sales(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (companyId) REFERENCES companies(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (brokerId) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX idx_saleId (saleId),
  INDEX idx_companyId (companyId),
  INDEX idx_brokerId (brokerId)
);

-- Criar tabela properfySyncHistory (histórico de sincronização Properfy)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS properfySyncHistory (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  syncType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'success', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  totalRecords INT DEFAULT 0,
  syncedRecords INT DEFAULT 0,
  failedRecords INT DEFAULT 0,
  errorMessage TEXT,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (companyId) REFERENCES companies(id),
  INDEX idx_companyId (companyId)
);

-- Criar tabela commissions (comissões)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commissions (
  id VARCHAR(64) PRIMARY KEY,
  saleId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,

  commissionValue DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,

  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (saleId) REFERENCES sales(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (companyId) REFERENCES companies(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (brokerId) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX idx_saleId (saleId),
  INDEX idx_companyId (companyId),
  INDEX idx_brokerId (brokerId)
);
